info.name: Stables-HT-ISS-HOL-time-daily-1-fix1
info.description:
STABLECOIN4: Extended to 45 days. Requires Java Option B (maturityDate filter).
maturityDate filter is a NO-OP for ISS-HOL (all monitoring times within contract lifecycle).

HOLDER PERSPECTIVE fix2: DERIVED PORTFOLIO INDEXES
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════

FIX vs fix1:
  fix1: SC_CASH_RESERVE and SC_TOTAL_RESERVES were HARDCODED Reference Indexes
        with manually pre-computed 31-point timeseries.
  fix2: Phase 0 runs 5 asset contracts through ACTUS FIRST, captures MD events,
        DERIVES cash timeline (initial + T-bill maturity proceeds) and
        reserves timeline (cash + surviving T-bill MtM via linear accretion).
        Then registers DERIVED data as Reference Indexes.

MARKET DATA (correctly hardcoded — external signals):
  STABLECOIN_PEG_DEV, PEG_RISK_SCORE, SC_CURVE_IMBALANCE,
  SC_ORDERBOOK_DECLINE, SC_CEX_OUTFLOW_MULT, SC_SENTIMENT_ZSCORE

PATTERN: Proven in Approach2-SequentialFeedback-fix2 (stablecoin2)

4 BEHAVIORAL MODELS x 31 DAILY EPOCHS = 124 PP EVENTS
6 PAM CONTRACTS (5 assets + 1 liability)
ZERO CODE CHANGES. Collection JSON only.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

MARKET DATA NORMALIZATION & CALIBRATION
════════════════════════════════════════

BANK_STRESS_INDEX [0,1]:
  Source: OFR Financial Stress Index (33 daily variables)
  URL: https://www.financialresearch.gov/financial-stress-index/
  Normalization: clamp((OFR_FSI + 2) / 12, 0, 1)
    0.0 = calm (OFR -2), 0.17 = normal (OFR 0), 0.50 = severe (OFR +4)
  Sim baseline: 0.10 ≈ OFR -0.8 (normal)
  Sim peak: 0.55 ≈ OFR +4.6 (moderate-severe, between SVB and COVID)
  Threshold 0.5: quality degrades above OFR +4.0 (severe banking stress)
  Alt sources: STLFSI4 (FRED), KCFSI (Kansas City Fed)

US_SOVEREIGN_STRESS [0,1]:
  Source: US 5-Year CDS Spread (Bloomberg/ICE/Markit)
  Normalization: clamp(CDS_bps / 200, 0, 1)
    0.0 = 0bps, 0.15 = 30bps (normal), 0.50 = 100bps, 0.875 = 175bps
  Sim peak: 0.14 ≈ 28bps (normal-range sovereign, bank-driven crisis scenario)
  Narrative: banks are failing but U.S. government itself is fine
  Alt source: MOVE Index (ICE/BofA bond volatility)

STABLECOIN_PEG_DEV [0,1]:
  Source: DEX TWAP / Chainlink Price Feed / CoinGecko
  Direct observation: |market_price - $1.00|
  Sim peak: 0.042 = 4.2% deviation (moderate, 74th percentile of 609 events)
  Calibration: Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2023), 609 de-peg events
    Minor 1-3%: 412 events (68%), Moderate 3-10%: 156 events (26%)
    Severe 10-25%: 31 events (5%), Catastrophic >25%: 10 events (1.6%)

PEG_RISK_SCORE [0-100]:
  Composite: weighted sum of peg deviation, EW signals, market microstructure
  Sim peak: 48 (Mar 12) — high stress, triggers EMERGENCY_LIQUIDATION at ≥45

EARLY WARNING SIGNALS (4 validated signals from 609-event dataset):
  SC_CURVE_IMBALANCE [0,1]: DEX pool ratio. Threshold >0.15. F1=0.80, lead=4.2h
  SC_ORDERBOOK_DECLINE [0,1]: CEX depth. Threshold >0.40. F1=0.70, lead=2.1h
  SC_CEX_OUTFLOW_MULT [1,∞): Exchange outflows vs baseline. Threshold >3x. F1=0.69, lead=6.8h
  SC_SENTIMENT_ZSCORE [-∞,+∞]: NLP z-score. Threshold <-2.0. F1=0.63, lead=8.4h

REGULATORY THRESHOLDS:
  backingThreshold=1.0:       GENIUS Act §4(a)(1), STABLE Act §3
  liquidityThreshold=0.2:     Basel III LCR adapted (note: MiCA Art.54 uses 0.30)
  wamMaxDays=93:              GENIUS Act §4(a)(1)(A)(iii)
  hqlaMinScore=100:           GENIUS Act permitted assets (all L1 HQLA)
  qualityFloor=50:            Basel III HQLA L2B classification
  attestationMaxDays=30:      MiCA Art.54 monthly attestation cycle
  maxSingleAssetShare=0.40:   Prudential concentration (SVB lesson)
  hhiWarningThreshold=0.35:   Adapted from DoJ/FTC HHI guidelines (>0.25=concentrated)
  bankStressThreshold=0.5:    ≈ OFR FSI +4.0 (COVID-level banking stress)
  pegDeviationThreshold=0.005: Lower bound of minor de-peg events (609-event dataset)
  sovereignMaxDegradation=0.30: Cap on sovereign-driven quality loss (T-bills remain L2B minimum)

RESEARCH REFERENCES:
  Lyons & Viswanath-Natraj (2023): 609 de-peg event redemption curves
  Fed FEDS Notes Dec 2025: "In the Shadow of Bank Runs" (SVB/USDC analysis)
  BIS Working Paper 1164: "Public Information and Stablecoin Runs"
  OFR Working Paper (2019): "The OFR Financial Stress Index"
  Sanhaji (2024): "Collapse of SVB and USDC Depegging" (MDPI FinTech)
  GENIUS Act S.919: §4(a)(1) reserve requirements
  MiCA Regulation (EU) 2023/1114: Art.54 EMT requirements
  Basel III LCR: HQLA classification (L1/L2A/L2B)

FIX1 (2026-03-10): VERIFIED CLEAN — no /behaviorStateAt calls.
  This collection uses rf2/scenarioSimulation on 8083 which internally
  activates the scenario via /scenarioSimulationStart. No change needed.

item.name: 0.3 Run 5 asset contracts — capture events & derive indexes

exec: pm.test('Derive portfolio indexes from ACTUS events', function(){
console.log('\u2501 PHASE 0.3: Extracting ACTUS events from 5 asset contracts');
// Contract parameters — must match the request body
// Extract actual MD events from ACTUS response
var key = Object.keys(contractMeta).find(function(k){ return cid.indexOf(k) >= 0 || cid === k; });
console.log('  \u2705 ACTUS MD: ' + key + ' matures ' + e.time.substring(0,10) + ' payoff=$' + (e.payoff||0).toFixed(2));
// Cash = initial cash + matured T-bill par values
// T-bill has matured — par goes to cash
// T-bill still alive — linear MtM accretion
console.log('  \u2501 DERIVED PORTFOLIO STATE (from ACTUS events):');
console.log('  Cash: $' + cashTimeline[0].value + ' \u2192 $' + cashTimeline[14].value + ' (Mar 15, post 4W maturity) \u2192 $' + cashTimeline[29].value + ' (Mar 30, post 8W maturity)');
console.log('  Mar ' + (d<10?'0':'') + d + ': Cash=$' + cashTimeline[i].value + ' Reserves=$' + reservesTimeline[i].value);
// Register both derived indexes via pm.sendRequest()
console.error('\u274c Phase 0 must run first — derived data not found');
if(err){ console.error('\u274c SC_CASH_RESERVE registration failed: ' + err); }
else { console.log('\u2705 SC_CASH_RESERVE: DERIVED from ACTUS T-bill events (' + cashBody.data.length + ' points)'); }
if(err){ console.error('\u274c SC_TOTAL_RESERVES registration failed: ' + err); }
else { console.log('\u2705 SC_TOTAL_RESERVES: DERIVED from ACTUS T-bill events (' + reservesBody.data.length + ' points)'); }
// This request is a placeholder — the real work is in pre-request
console.log('\u2501 Phase 1A complete: SC_CASH_RESERVE + SC_TOTAL_RESERVES derived from ACTUS events');
console.log('  (Not hardcoded — computed from actual T-bill MD event payoffs)');
console.log('\u2705 HOL_PEG_RISK_01: Composite risk 2→48 peak→0 (market data)');
console.log('\u2705 br_hol_01: BackingRatioModel (reads DERIVED reserves + cash)');
console.log('\u2705 sc_hol_ht_daily_01: 8 RI (2 DERIVED + 6 market) + 4 BH = 12 descriptors');});

item.name: 5.1 Run HOL Simulation (6 contracts, 31 daily epochs, 4 models)

console.log('  SC_CASH_RESERVE + SC_TOTAL_RESERVES derived from ACTUS T-bill events');
console.log('  Models: RedemptionPressure + EarlyWarning + BackingRatio + MaturityLadder');
if(pps.length>10) console.log('    ... and '+(pps.length-10)+' more PP events');
pm.test('Liability has 124 PP events (4 models x 31 days)', function(){
